hero.title: Holiday Rental Compliance Service in Puglia
hero.subtitle: Make your holiday home fully compliant. We handle everything.
hero.cta: Secure your peace of mind today

problem.title: New Mandatory Requirement
problem.description: The Puglia Region has introduced a new mandatory requirement. To continue operating legally, you must file a 'CIA' (Comunicazione di Inizio Attività).
bullets: It is a strict legal mandate from the Puglia Region.
It applies specifically to non-entrepreneurial tourist rentals.
It must be formally submitted to the local SUAP (Sportello Unico Attività Produttive).

deadline.title: Critical Deadline
deadline.note: (for properties already registered in DMS Puglia)

risks.title: The Risks
risks.description: Operating without a submitted CIA will result in financial penalties and an unauthorized, illegal operational status for your rental property.

barriers.title: The Real Barrier
barriers.description: The law itself is just a rule; the actual headache is the execution. The process requires navigating complex Italian portals like ImpresainGiorno, securing a SPID (Digital Identity), and dealing with the local SUAP. For non-italians, the language barrier and systemic complexities are the true threats to your peace of mind.

solution.title: Solving the Bureaucratic Puzzle
solution.subtitle: We combine local technical firepower with international client care.

dario.name: Dario
dario.description: Based in Puglia, absolute master of regional regulations, and a practical expert in all tax regulation in Italy.

maria.name: Maria
maria.description: An international relations expert with an established network of foreign clients. She bridges the cultural gap and ensures you are fully supported. She handles numerous administrative practices.

fluent.title: Fluent in English, native in Puglia
fluent.description: We know that for international owners, language is the first barrier. Our service is 100% professional and 100% understandable. We translate complex Italian tax and regional laws into clear, actionable English.

packages.title: Tailored solutions for your specific needs
packages.subtitle: We have structured our compliance services into three distinct tiers.

process.title: A clear and simple path forward

step2.title: Review

footer.description: The CIA is just the entry point. We are here to protect your investment today and optimize it for the future.
